---
title: "ROBOTICS HANDBOOK"
author: "Sarvesh Khire"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: slam-chapters
    contents:
      - chapters/factor-graphs-slam/overview.qmd
    type: grid
    fields: [title, subtitle]
    sort: false
---

## Notes on Robotics Fundamentals

Concepts and mathematics from robotics, SLAM, and localization — written
the way I wish someone had explained them to me.

### SLAM

:::{#slam-chapters}
:::

### Linear Algebra

*(coming soon)*
